name: Sour Cream Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
Mix together the dry ingredients.
In a separate bowl, beat together the sour cream, milk, egg, and vegetable oil.
Combine the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients.
Spoon the batter into a well-buttered 8-inch or 9-inch baking pan.
Bake for 10 minutes at 375 degrees F., then bake for an additional 15 minutes.
Serve warm, directly from the baking pan. Alternatively, allow to cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
